subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous kingdom did Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II belong to?

options.option_explanation_en: Vijay Singh was a well-known poet and lyricist in Rajasthan who composed many songs about the kingdom.
options.option_explanation_hi: विज्यां एक राजन और श्रीयां को राजदूकनार्नी कोणिकनार्नार्नी कोणिकनार्नी कोणिकनार्नार्नी कोणिकनार्नी कोणिकनार्नार्ना

options.option_explanation_en: Vijay Singh, also known as Vidya Singh, was a prominent poet from Rajasthan.
